title: Killmods
description: This mod is updated for now
body:
Welcome to Killmods! This is a mod I created using Mcreator, so go check it out here https://mcreator.net/ and safe I promis

The other versions will be added later.
If you want to download the most recent versions of the mod go to this link
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/killmods

Killmods adds a quantity of things never seen before the depth in the overworld other dimensions armor and tools and also tools capable of breaking 9 blocks at the same time and wands, some altars and much more, clearly soon I add a new expansion.

This mod adds a vast amount of resources including structures, swords.

I'm not saying specifically what it contains because I want it to be some kind of surprise.

This mod is not ready for world updates from type 1.12 to 1.14 the same is not possible for 1.15 to 1.16 and so on with 1.18, if you then want to update the world the same and at your own risk.

The forge versions are more complete.

I recommend you to use the JEI mod for 1.12.2+ to see the recipes
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei

Modpack Permissions

Go for It.
